name: Aaronson Simple Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef cubes (chuck cut is fine)
4 Tomatoes; skinned and chopped (or 28 oz Can whole tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large, heavy Dutch oven (I used a LeCreuset) until hot.
2. Add the beef cubes and sear/brown them on all sides without any added fat or oil.
3. When browned, add the onions and sauté until they are browned slightly.
4. Deglaze the pan by adding wine and scraping up the browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
5. Add beef broth and tomatoes (or tomato paste) and mix well.
6. Bring to a boil, then lower heat to maintain a slow simmer.
7. Cook for 1/2 hour longer.
8. Add potatoes and cook for an additional hour.
9. Add carrots and beans and continue cooking until the beef is tender (about 3 hours total).
10. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper and any herbs you like.
11. Serve over rice or noodles. Optionally, add a whole bay leaf, thyme, basil at the beginning, Aujus gravy mix to enrich and thicken the sauce, or frozen peas for color.
Enjoy!
